name: sensys-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ACM/IEEE SenSys submissions: sensing/embedded-AI topic fit, the two-deadline HotCRP review model, double-blind submission audit, author response and revision, camera-ready and ACM artifact badges, real-testbed reproducibility, energy and low-power evaluation, supplementary material, related work, writing style, and cycle workflow. Grounded in the SenSys 2026/2027 Calls for Papers on sensys.acm.org, checked on 2026-07-09.
